applications_assignee_not_both.def: CHECK (((assigned_user_id IS NULL) OR (assigned_team_id IS NULL)))

applications_criminal_policy_required_ch.def: CHECK ((((decline_reason_code IS DISTINCT FROM 'decline_criminal_record_relevant'::text) AND (NOT (COALESCE(adverse_factor_codes, ARRAY[]::text[]) @> ARRAY['adverse_criminal_record_relevant'::text]))) OR ((criminal_screening_policy_id IS NOT NULL) AND (criminal_screening_policy_version IS NOT NULL))))

contacts_signatory_needs_id.def: CHECK (((NOT is_signatory) OR (id_number_hash IS NOT NULL)))

inspections_assignee_not_both.def: CHECK (((assigned_user_id IS NULL) OR (assigned_team_id IS NULL)))

legal_hold_events_lift_consistency.def: CHECK ((((event_type = 'hold_lifted'::text) AND (lift_event_id IS NOT NULL)) OR ((event_type <> 'hold_lifted'::text) AND (lift_event_id IS NULL))))

maintenance_requests_assignee_not_both.def: CHECK (((assigned_user_id IS NULL) OR (assigned_team_id IS NULL)))

organisations_addr2_province_check.def: CHECK ((addr2_province = ANY (ARRAY['Eastern Cape'::text, 'Free State'::text, 'Gauteng'::text, 'KwaZulu-Natal'::text, 'Limpopo'::text, 'Mpumalanga'::text, 'Northern Cape'::text, 'North West'::text, 'Western Cape'::text])))

organisations_addr_province_check.def: CHECK ((addr_province = ANY (ARRAY['Eastern Cape'::text, 'Free State'::text, 'Gauteng'::text, 'KwaZulu-Natal'::text, 'Limpopo'::text, 'Mpumalanga'::text, 'Northern Cape'::text, 'North West'::text, 'Western Cape'::text])))

properties_manager_not_both.def: CHECK (((managing_agent_id IS NULL) OR (managing_team_id IS NULL)))

properties_province_check.def: CHECK ((province = ANY (ARRAY['Western Cape'::text, 'Eastern Cape'::text, 'Northern Cape'::text, 'North West'::text, 'Free State'::text, 'KwaZulu-Natal'::text, 'Gauteng'::text, 'Limpopo'::text, 'Mpumalanga'::text])))

units_assignee_not_both.def: CHECK (((assigned_agent_id IS NULL) OR (assigned_team_id IS NULL)))

user_orgs_role_nonempty.def: CHECK (((role IS NOT NULL) AND (length(TRIM(BOTH FROM role)) > 0)))
